name: runway-mcp
description: Job-fit filter for international students — fetch jobs, check H-1B visa sponsorship, and score CV match in one call.
long_description:
runwayMCP gives Claude the real data it needs to evaluate job postings for international students (F-1/OPT) seeking US roles.

**What it does in one call (`analyze_job`):**
- Fetches the job posting from Greenhouse, Ashby, Lever, or any board with schema.org markup
- Checks the company's H-1B sponsorship history against USCIS data
- Scores how well the job matches your stored CV (0–100)
- Returns an `APPLY / CONSIDER / SKIP` recommendation

**Setup:** After installing, tell Claude to set up your profile: *"Set up my profile using my CV at /path/to/resume.pdf"*

**Supported job boards:** Greenhouse, Ashby, Lever, and any board that embeds `schema.org/JobPosting` markup (many Workday and ADP pages work via generic fallback).

**Note:** `setup_profile`, `analyze_match`, and `analyze_job` use MCP Sampling — Claude Desktop will ask for your approval the first time these tools make a sampling request. This is expected.

tools.name: analyze_job
tools.description: One-call orchestrator: fetch job + check H-1B visa sponsorship + score CV match. Returns APPLY/CONSIDER/SKIP recommendation.

tools.name: fetch_job_posting
tools.description: Fetch and parse a job posting from a URL (Greenhouse, Ashby, Lever, or generic fallback).

tools.name: check_visa_sponsorship
tools.description: Check a company's H-1B sponsorship history against USCIS data. Returns GREEN/YELLOW/RED verdict.

tools.name: setup_profile
tools.description: Ingest a CV file (.pdf or .docx) and store it as a structured profile for job matching.

tools.name: update_profile
tools.description: Replace the stored CV profile with a new file.

tools.name: analyze_match
tools.description: Score a job posting against the stored CV profile. Returns 0–100 score with matched/missing skills.
